title: Create: Deepslatify
description: A simple mod adding deepslate processing to create
body:
#### This mod requires [create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)

Adds processing for deepslate into zinc, iron, copper, and gold. Basically giving deepslate a use.

![Process](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21a6b252465c1c096a4ff48ee19f51176da1bbc3.png)

SORRY IF RECIPES BROKEN IM WORKING ON IT
